prestazioni: Engine swap to a J35Y8 (3.5L V6 from the 2018+ Honda Accord 200hp/262Nm) with a custom billet aluminum intake manifold by Hybrid Racing, paired with a Garrett GTX3076R turbocharger (0.82 A/R, 62mm compressor inducer) and a Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate for precise boost control at 18psi on E85 fuel

Full 3.5L V6 J35Y8 forged internals by Manley Performance: 9.8:1 compression forged pistons, H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft, mated to a K-Tuned 6-speed manual transmission swap with a PRL Motorsports short shifter and a South Bend Clutch Stage 3 twin-disc setup for 500whp reliability

Custom Motec M150 ECU with a Haltech CAN bus expansion module for full sensor integration, including a 4-bar MAP sensor, AEM X-Series wideband AFR gauge, and a Hondata traction control system with launch control tuned for 0-60mph in 4.2 seconds on drag radials
estetica: Liberty Walk LB Works widebody kit (Passport-specific, not a rebadge) with custom carbon fiber fender flares, front splitter, and rear diffuser, all painted in BASF RM+ Matte Urban Grey with a 3M Satin Black roof wrap

Custom 20x10.5 ET22 front and 20x11.5 ET15 rear Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels in Gunmetal Bronze, wrapped in 275/40R20 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires with a 5mm spacer kit from Hardrace for aggressive flush fitment

Full interior overhaul with Recaro Pole Position seats (Honda-specific mounting brackets by Bride), a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel with a NRG quick-release hub, and a custom roll cage by Custom Cages UK (FIA-spec, bolt-in, powder-coated in Gloss Black) with integrated LED shift lights
